title: HWAXAgentInstallReport
description: POSTed by the agent to /api/v1/agents/installs once an install attempt completes (success or failure). The hub persists each report to a dedicated install_reports table (Phase 2 migration) so admins can see per-agent install health. Status is mutually exclusive with audit-event.kind — status describes the terminal outcome of one install, kind in audit-event describes an event class.

agent_id.description: WindowsAgent.id — must match the subject (sub) of the access_token used.

status.description: Terminal status of this single install attempt. 'partial' = installer exited 0 but post_install_check failed and rollback was not requested.

sha256_verified.description: True iff the agent computed SHA-256 over the downloaded bytes and it matched the manifest. The hub treats false as a hard failure even if the rest of the install succeeded.

error.description: Short, human-readable error summary. Long traces should go to log_excerpt.

log_excerpt.description: Last N KB of installer stdout/stderr. The hub truncates above 16 KB.

previous_version.description: Version the agent rolled back TO (only meaningful when status=rolled_back).
